# service-foundry
Opinionated AWS Platform  +  SST  +  TypeScript  +  Testing  +  CI/CD  +  Multi-Environment  +  Multi-Region  +  Production Pattern



## Principles
1. TypeScript strict mode
2. Vitest
3. ESLint
4. GitHub Actions
5. CodeQL
6. OIDC deployment to AWS
7. Multi-account support
8. Multi-region support
9. Environment isolation
10. Infrastructure and application tested together
